name: Bug Report
about: Report a software error or unexpected behavior

labels: bug
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 15, Desktop]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, logs).
